allow: Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('d:/plateful/assets/jsons/menu_items.json'\)\); print\('Total items:', len\(data\)\); print\('Last few IDs:', [d['id'] for d in data[-5:]]\); print\('r1 items:', len\([d for d in data if d['restaurantId']=='r1']\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('d:/plateful/assets/jsons/menu_items.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('Total items:', len\(data\)\); print\('Last few IDs:', [d['id'] for d in data[-5:]]\); print\('r1 items:', len\([d for d in data if d['restaurantId']=='r1']\)\)")
